metadata.title: Omnisearch
metadata.description: A search engine that just works

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 已禁用。请重启 Obsidian。")
Notice("Omnisearch - 已启用。请重启 Obsidian。")

regex.source: Notice("Omnisearch - Cache missing or invalid. Some freezes may occur while Omnisearch indexes your vault.")
regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 缓存丢失或无效。索引过程中可能会出现卡顿。")

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 缓存已清除。请重启 Obsidian。")

regex.source: Notice("Omnisearch - Your index cache may be incorrect or corrupted. If this message keeps appearing, go to Settings to clear the cache.",5e3)
regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 您的索引缓存可能不正确或已损坏。如果此消息继续出现,请转到设置中清除缓存。")

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch \u26A0\uFE0F 您的缓存可能有问题。您应该在 Omnisearch 设置中清理缓存并重启 Obsidian。")

regex.source: Notice("Omnisearch - There was an error while loading the cache. Please restart Obsidian.")
regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 加载缓存时出错。请重启 Obsidian。")

regex.target: Notice(`${r.toAdd.length} 文件需要索引。索引过程中 Obsidian 可能会出现卡顿和冻结现象`,1e4)

regex.source: .setName("Show a notification when the server starts")

regex.target: .setName("忽略阿拉伯语变音符号 (测试版)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable caching to speed up indexing time. In rare cases, the cache write may cause a crash in Obsidian. This option will disable itself if it happens.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用缓存以加快索引时间。在极少数情况下,写入缓存可能导致 Obsidian 崩溃。如果发生这种情况,此选项将自动禁用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Re-executes the previous query when opening Omnisearch.")
regex.target: .setDesc("打开 Omnisearch 时重新执行上次查询。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`By default, files that are in Obsidian's "Options > Files & Links > Excluded Files" list are downranked in results.
        Enable this option to completely hide them.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`默认情况下,Obsidian 的 "选项 > 文件与链接 > 排除的文件" 列表中的文件会在结果中降级。
        启用此选项可完全隐藏它们。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Folders to downrank in search results. Files in these folders will be downranked in results.  They will still be indexed for tags, unlike excluded files.  Folders should be comma delimited.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在搜索结果中降级的文件夹。这些文件夹中的文件将在结果中降级。与排除的文件不同,它们仍然会被索引用于标签。文件夹应以逗号分隔。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Enable this if Obsidian often freezes while making searches.
        Words shorter than 3 characters won't be used as prefixes; this can reduce search delay but will return fewer results.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果 Obsidian 在进行搜索时常卡顿,请启用此选项。
        小于3个字符的单词将不会用作前缀;这可以减少搜索延迟,但会返回较少的结果。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Enable this if you want to be able to search for URLs as separate words.
        This setting has a strong impact on indexing performance, and can crash Obsidian under certain conditions.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果您想将 URL 作为单独的单词进行搜索,请启用此选项。
        此设置对索引性能有较大影响,并且在某些条件下可能导致 Obsidian 崩溃。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Open and create files in a new pane instead of the current pane.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在新窗格中打开和创建文件,而不是当前窗格。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Navigate down the results with Ctrl/\u2318 + J/N, or navigate up with Ctrl/\u2318 + K/P")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用 Ctrl/\u2318 + J/N 下移结果,或使用 Ctrl/\u2318 + K/P 上移结果。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Define the level of fuzziness for the search. The higher the fuzziness, the more results you'll get.")
regex.target: .setDesc("定义搜索的模糊度。模糊度越高,返回的结果越多。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a button on the sidebar to open the Vault search modal.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在侧边栏上添加一个按钮以打开仓库搜索模态框。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Shows the contextual part of the note that matches the search. Disable this to only show filenames in results.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示与搜索匹配的笔记上下文部分。关闭此选项仅显示文件名。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Activate this option to render line returns in result excerpts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此选项可在结果摘录中渲染换行符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Will highlight matching results when enabled. See README for more customization options.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用后将高亮匹配的结果。更多自定义选项请参阅 README。")

regex.source: .setDesc('You can set custom weights for values of header properties (e.g. "keywords"). Weights under 1.0 will downrank the results.')
regex.target: .setDesc('您可以为头部属性值(如 "关键词")设置自定义权重。权重小于1.0将使结果降级。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Will display a notification if the server is enabled, at Obsidian startup.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果服务器已启用,启动 Obsidian 时将显示通知。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Adds a LOT of logs for debugging purposes. Don't forget to disable it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("为调试目的添加大量日志。不要忘记禁用它。")

regex.source: ln(`No icon pack found for prefix: ${i}`)
regex.target: ln(`未找到前缀为 ${i} 的图标包`)

regex.source: ln("Icons path is not set. Cannot load icon SVG.")
regex.target: ln("图标路径未设置。无法加载图标 SVG。")

regex.source: ln(`Failed to load icon SVG for ${t} at ${c}:`,l)
regex.target: ln(`加载图标 SVG 失败，图标为 ${t}，路径为 ${c}:`,l)

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`\u26A0\uFE0F Changing indexing settings will clear the cache, and requires a restart of Obsidian.

${r?`\u{1F44D} You have installed Text Extractor, Omnisearch can use it to index PDFs and images contents.
Text extraction only works on desktop, but the cache can be synchronized with your mobile device.`:'\u26A0\uFE0F Omnisearch requires Text Extractor to index PDFs and images.'} ${i?'
\u{1F44D} You have installed AI Image Analyzer, Omnisearch can use it to index images contents with ai.':'
\u26A0\uFE0F Omnisearch requires AI Image Analyzer to index images with ai.'}`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`\u26A0\uFE0F 更改索引设置将清除缓存，并需要重新启动 Obsidian。

${r?`\u{1F44D} 您已安装 文本提取器(Text Extractor)，Omnisearch 可以使用它来索引 PDF 和图像内容。
文本提取仅在桌面环境中有效，但缓存可以与您的移动设备同步。`:'\u26A0\uFE0F Omnisearch 需要 文本提取器(Text Extractor) 来索引 PDF 和图像。'} ${i?'
\u{1F44D} 您已安装 AI 图像分析器(AI Image Analyzer)，Omnisearch 可以使用它来通过 AI 索引图像内容。':'
\u26A0\uFE0F Omnisearch 需要 AI 图像分析器(AI Image Analyzer) 来通过 AI 索引图像。'}`))

regex.source: .setDesc(yt("Omnisearch will use Text Extractor to index the content of your PDFs."))
regex.target: .setDesc(yt(`Omnisearch 将使用文本提取器来索引您的 PDF 内容。`))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(` Omnisearch can index filenames of "unsupported" files, such as e.g. 
.mp4
or non-extracted PDFs & images.
"Obsidian setting" will respect the value of "Files & Links > Detect all file extensions".`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(` Omnisearch 可以索引“不受支持”文件的文件名，例如 
.mp4
或未提取的 PDF 和图像。
“Obsidian 设置”将尊重“文件和链接 > 检测所有文件扩展名”的值。`))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`If you have a custom property in your notes that you want to use as the title in search results.
Leave empty to disable.`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`如果您在笔记中有一个自定义属性，希望在搜索结果中用作标题。
留空则禁用。`))

regex.source: .setDesc(yt("Omnisearch will use Text Extractor to OCR your images and index their content."))
regex.target: .setDesc(yt(`Omnisearch 将使用文本提取器来识别您的图像并索引其内容。`))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`In addition to standard md files, Omnisearch can also index other PLAINTEXT files.
Add extensions separated by a space, without the dot. Example: "txt org csv".
\u26A0\uFE0F Using extensions of non-plaintext files (like .pptx) WILL cause crashes, because Omnisearch will try to index their content.`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`除了标准的 md 文件外，Omnisearch 还可以索引其他 纯文本 文件。
添加扩展名时请用空格分隔，不要加点。示例："txt org csv"。
\u26A0\uFE0F 使用非纯文本文件的扩展名（如 .pptx）将导致崩溃， 因为 Omnisearch 将尝试索引它们的内容。`))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`Enable this if you want to be able to search for CamelCaseWords as separate words.
\u26A0\uFE0F Changing this setting will clear the cache.
${mo}`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`如果希望将 CamelCaseWords 作为单独的单词进行搜索，请启用此选项。
\u26A0\uFE0F 更改此设置将清除缓存。
${mo}`))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`Some results are embedded in other notes.
This setting controls the maximum number of embeds to show in the search results. Set to 0 to disable.
Also works with Text Extractor for embedded images and documents.`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`某些结果被 嵌入 到其他笔记中。
此设置控制在搜索结果中显示的最大嵌入数量。设置为 0 以禁用。
也适用于嵌入的图像和文档的文本提取。`))

regex.source: .setDesc(yt(`Shows a button next to the search input, to create a note. Acts the same as the shift \u21B5 shortcut, can be useful for mobile device users.`))
regex.target: .setDesc(yt(`在搜索输入框旁边显示一个按钮，用于创建笔记。 功能与 shift \u21B5 快捷键相同，对移动设备用户可能有帮助。`))

regex.source: .setDesc(yt('Omnisearch can be used through a simple HTTP server (more information).'))
regex.target: .setDesc(yt('Omnisearch 可以通过简单的 HTTP 服务器使用 (更多信息)。'))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`Normalize diacritics in search terms. Words like "br\xFBl\xE9e" or "\u017Elu\u0165ou\u010Dk\xFD" will be indexed as "brulee" and "zlutoucky".
\u26A0\uFE0F You probably should NOT disable this.
\u26A0\uFE0F Changing this setting will clear the cache.
${mo}`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`在搜索词中规范化变音符号。像 "br\xFBl\xE9e" 或 "\u017Elu\u0165ou\u010Dk\xFD" 这样的词将被索引为 "brulee" 和 "zlutoucky"。
\u26A0\uFE0F 您最好不要 禁用 此选项。
\u26A0\uFE0F 更改此设置将清除缓存。
${mo}`))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`Omnisearch has a security feature that automatically disables cache writing if it cannot fully perform the operation.
Use this option to force the cache to be saved, even if it causes a crash.
\u26A0\uFE0F Enabling this setting could lead to crash loops`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`Omnisearch 具有安全功能，如果无法完全执行操作，会自动禁用缓存写入。
使用此选项可强制保存缓存，即使会导致崩溃。
\u26A0\uFE0F 启用此设置可能导致循环崩溃`))

regex.source:
.setDesc(yt(`Erase all Omnisearch cache data. Use this if Omnisearch results are inconsistent, missing, or appear outdated.
${mo}`))
regex.target:
.setDesc(yt(`清除所有 Omnisearch 缓存数据。 如果 Omnisearch 结果不一致、缺失或过时，请使用此选项。
${mo}`))
